'''Kryndyn''' was the capital and most populous city of [[Zelos II]]. Like the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] other cities, it was surrounded by a 10-meter high wall with six gates. It had a garrison of 50,000 troops. In addition to a thriving commodities market, the city had a wide variety of bars, casinos, entertainment centers, libraries, and hotels.<ref name="PoG2" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|13|Day of the Sepulchral Night (short story)|reprint=1}}
